name: Stuffed Mushrooms#3
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Remove the stems from the mushrooms and reserve them for another recipe. If desired, mince some of the stems and include them with the stuffing mix.
3. Combine the bread crumbs with the sour cream and mix until well blended.
4. Add onion and green peppers. Mix well.
5. Fill each mushroom cap with the stuffing mix and place on a cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 20 - 30 minutes or until hot.
7. Remove from oven.
8. Garnish with sliced olives and serve as a great appetizer.
